visualizerParams.title: Cycle Detection DFS Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The cycle detection function is incorrectly identifying cycles in cases where a node is reachable via multiple paths but no actual loop exists (a DAG). Find and fix the flaw in the visit tracking.

solution.explanation: In directed graphs, a cycle is only present if we encounter a node that is currently in the RECURSION STACK (a 'back-edge'). The buggy code incorrectly flagged any already-visited node as a cycle, which incorrectly returns True for diamond-shaped graphs that are actually acyclic.
